package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_caching_per_request_config_cache_rebuild: Layer: Caching. Flag request-scoped caches rebuilt from config or environment on every call.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule512NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario512Negative(records []Rule512NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
